transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my heat pump is leaking water and it's getting bad! This is Susan Diaz at 9 Lakeview Drive. Dispatcher: Okay Susan, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 9 Lakeview Drive right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: heat pump is leaking water
